name: SHORT EXPIRY-CLEARANCE: King Adult Dog Food Lamb & Rice 500g
shortDescription: Fully balanced all-natural dog food with lamb protein and brewer's yeast for immune support. Carefully formulated by a dog nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult large breed dogs.
description: King Plus Adult Dog Food Lamb & Rice, fully balanced all-natural dog food with lamb protein and brewer's yeast for immune support. Carefully formulated by a dog nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult large-breed dogs. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ................... 21% Fat..................... 9% Crude Cellulose (Fiber)......4% Crude Ash ......................10% INGREDIENTS: Wheat, Corn, Processed Animal Protein, Animal Fat, Corn Gluten, Liver Aroma, Rice, Salt, Dried Brewer's Yeast. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 , B2 , B3 (niacin) ,B6 , B12 , B7 (biotin) , B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan. daily feeding guide king plus adult dog food
